report.summary: Built a comprehensive Yield Tokenization Guide 2026 learn page and an interactive Token Security Scanner tool with mock contract analysis across 6 chains

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Yield tokenization ecosystem: Pendle Finance dominates with $5.7B avg TVL (peaked $13.4B), 50%+ of DeFi yield sector TVL, deployed across 9+ chains including Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Sonic, HyperEVM
PT/YT mechanics: Principal Tokens (PT) provide fixed yield locked until maturity; Yield Tokens (YT) give leveraged exposure to variable yield; Standardized Yield (SY) normalizes assets
Spectra Finance emerging as competitor with $38-190M TVL, launched on Flare with near-zero gas costs; phased rollout strategy differentiating from Pendle
2026 developments: One-click leveraged PTs, yield-bearing stablecoin markets (USDG, apxUSD), institutional adoption accelerating
Token security landscape: Rug pulls caused $2.8B in losses in 2025; key tools include Token Sniffer, GoPlus Security, Sharpe AI, AiCryptoScan scanning 24-40+ EVM chains
Critical security checks: honeypot detection, liquidity lock verification, hidden mint functions, owner privileges, blacklist functions, tax rate analysis, holder distribution

sections.title: Content Created
items: Learn guide: 'Yield Tokenization Guide 2026' — ~2800 words covering PT/YT mechanics, SY standard, protocol comparison (Pendle vs Spectra), trading strategies, risks, and 6-item FAQ
Tool page: 'Token Security Scanner' — full tool page with 4 feature cards, 3-step how-to guide, 6-item FAQ, educational content on rug pull prevention, and 5 related tool links

Interactive component: TokenSecurityScanner.tsx — client component with address input, 6-chain selector, deterministic mock analysis generating risk scores, 8 security checks with pass/fail/warning states, and token info display

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Learn page title: 'Yield Tokenization Guide 2026 — PT/YT Tokens & Best Protocols | degen0x'
Learn page target keyword: 'yield tokenization', 'PT YT tokens', 'Pendle guide 2026'
Learn page schemas: ArticleSchema + FAQSchema (6 questions) combined
Tool page title: 'Token Security Scanner - Rug Pull & Honeypot Checker | degen0x'
Tool page target keyword: 'token security scanner', 'rug pull checker', 'honeypot detector'
Tool page schemas: ToolPageSchema (WebApplication) + FAQSchema (6 questions) combined
Both pages include OpenGraph, Twitter cards, breadcrumbs, and 3-5 internal links each
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
